      Apple AirPods (3rd Generation) Wireless Ear Buds, Bluetooth Headphones, Personalized Spatial Audio, Sweat and Water Resistant, Lightning Charging Case Included, Up to 30 Hours of Battery Life

      Visit the Apple Store
      4.5 4.5 out of 5 stars (26,585)
      Currently unavailable.
      We don't know when or if this item will be back in stock.
      Sign in to continue
      Brand Apple
      Color White
      Ear Placement In Ear
      Form Factor In Ear
      Noise Control Sound Isolation

      About this item

      • PERSONALIZED SPATIAL AUDIO — With sound that suits your unique ear shape along with dynamic head tracking, AirPods (3rd generation) deliver an immersive listening experience that places sound all around you. You can also listen to select songs, shows, and movies in Dolby Atmos.
      • SWEAT AND WATER PROTECTION — AirPods and the Lightning Charging Case is rated IPX4 sweat and water resistant, so they’ll withstand anything from heavy workouts to rain.
      • A POWERFUL CASE — Recharge your AirPods with the portable Lightning Charging Case for power throughout the day, wherever you go.
      • PINCH-PERFECT CONTROL — The force sensor lets you control your entertainment as well as answer, end, and mute or unmute yourself on calls.
      • LONG BATTERY LIFE — Up to 6 hours of listening time with one charge, and up to 30 hours total listening time with the Lightning Charging Case.
      • ALWAYS-ON “HEY SIRI” — Say “Hey Siri” to activate your favorite personal assistant and stay on top of everyday tasks like playing music, making calls, getting directions, or checking your schedule.
      • MAGICAL EXPERIENCE — Place AirPods near your iPhone or iPad and tap Connect to pair with every device in your iCloud account. Audio seamlessly switches between devices and automatically pauses when you take AirPods out of your ears.
      • AUDIO SHARING — Audio Sharing lets you connect two sets of AirPods effortlessly to your iPhone, iPad, iPod touch, or Apple TV, with individual volume control for each set.
      • LEGAL DISCLAIMERS — This is a summary of the main product features. See “Additional information” to learn more.

      Technical Details

      AirPods (3rd Gen)

      Audio Technology
      • Custom high-excursion Apple driver
      • Custom high dynamic range amplifier
      • Personalized Spatial audio with dynamic head tracking
      • Adaptive EQ

      Size and Weight
      • AirPods (each)
        • Height: 1.21 inches (30.79 mm)
        • Width: 0.72 inch (18.26 mm)
        • Depth: 0.76 inch (19.21 mm)
        • Weight: 0.15 ounce (4.28 grams)
      • Lightning Charging Case or MagSafe Charging Case
        • Height: 1.83 inches (46.40 mm)
        • Width: 2.14 inches (54.40 mm)
        • Depth: 0.84 inch (21.38 mm)
        • Weight: 1.34 ounces (37.91 grams)

      Charging Case
      • Lightning Charging Case
        • The Lightning Charging Case works with the Lightning connector
      • MagSafe Charging Case
        • The MagSafe Charging Case works wirelessly with MagSafe charger and Qi-certified chargers or with the Lightning connector

      Battery
      • AirPods
        • Up to 6 hours of listening time with a single charge (up to 5 hours with Personalized Spatial Audio Enabled)
        • Up to 4 hours of talk time with a single charge
      • AirPods with Lightning Charging Case or MagSafe Charging Case
        • Up to 30 hours of listening time
        • Up to 20 hours of talk time
        • 5 minutes in the case provides around 1 hour of listening time or around 1 hour of talk time

      Compatibility
      • iPhone Models
        • iPhone 6s or later
        • iPhone SE (1st generation) or later
      • iPod Models
        • iPod touch (7th generation)
      • Mac Models
        • MacBook (Retina, 12-inch, Early 2015–2017)
        • MacBook Air (Mid 2012) or later
        • MacBook Pro (Mid 2012) or later
        • iMac (Late 2012) or later
        • iMac Pro (2017)
        • Mac mini (Late 2012) or later
        • Mac Studio (2022) or later
        • Mac Pro (Late 2013) or later
      • iPad Models
        • iPad Pro 9.7-inch or later
        • iPad (5th generation) or later
        • iPad Air 2 or later
        • iPad mini 4 or later
      • Apple Watch Models
        • All Apple Watch Models
      • Apple TV Models
        • Apple TV 4K
        • Apple TV HD

      Controls
      • Press once to play or pause media
      • Press once to answer a call or mute or unmute
      • Press twice to end a call
      • Press twice to skip forward
      • Press three times to skip back
      • Press and hold for Siri - Say “Hey Siri” to do things like play a song, make a call, or get directions

      Sensors
      • Dual beamforming microphones
      • Inward-facing microphone
      • Skin-detect sensor
      • Motion-detecting accelerometer
      • Speech-detecting accelerometer
      • Force sensor

      Chip
      • H1 headphone chip

      Sweat and Water Resistant
      • Sweat and water resistant (IPX4) : AirPods and charging case

      Connectivity
      • Bluetooth 5.0 wireless technology

      In the Box
      • AirPods
      • Lightning Charging Case or MagSafe Charging Case
      • Lightning to USB-C Cable
      • Documentation

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find these wireless earbuds to be a great Apple product with nice sound quality that is clear and loud. However, the fit receives negative feedback, with multiple customers reporting that they don't stay in their ears and are too big.

      • Aaron Fast
        5 out of 5 stars
        Best Airpods yet
        Reviewed in the United States on January 17, 2026
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        These AirPods (3rd Gen) are a game-changer for daily use—crystal clear sound with punchy bass, seamless switching between my iPhone, Mac, and Apple Watch, and all-day comfort thanks to the shorter stems and vented design. Spatial Audio with head tracking makes movies and music feel immersive, and the Find My integration gives total peace of mind if they go missing. Battery life hits 6 hours per charge (30 with the case), and setup is instant with no fuss. If you’re in the Apple ecosystem, these are the best wireless earbuds you can get—worth every penny for the polish and reliability.

      • mr newyork
        5 out of 5 stars
        Great Sound and Battery Life, but Fit Might Be an Issue
        Reviewed in the United States on August 26, 2024
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        The Apple AirPods (3rd Generation) are a solid choice if you're looking for wireless earbuds with impressive features. The sound quality is fantastic, and the personalized spatial audio adds a nice immersive touch to your listening experience. I really appreciate the sweat and water resistance, which makes them a great option for workouts or outdoor activities.

        The battery life is another standout feature—up to 30 hours with the charging case means you won’t be constantly reaching for a charger. The Lightning charging case is convenient, especially if you already use other Apple products.

        However, the fit might be a bit of a hit or miss depending on your ear shape. They don’t come with multiple ear tip sizes like some other earbuds, so if you have smaller or differently shaped ears, they might not fit as securely as you'd like. This can affect comfort and sound isolation, which is something to consider if you’re picky about earbud fit.

      • Don’t buy, choose another brand
        5 out of 5 stars
        Love these! So glad I decided to buy
        Reviewed in the United States on January 31, 2024
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I had the 2nd gen & loved those but my husband borrowed them & broke one. So I decided to upgrade. Headphones with the rubber tips never stay in my ears so I decided to go with these 3rd gens. I love them and the sound quality is amazing. But they don’t seem to fit as well in my ears as the 2nd gens. These seem a little bigger and it’s hard to keep them in place if I’m talking or eating while wearing them. Another thing I don’t like is that you no longer tap to pause, it’s a little awkward to find the button on the AirPod. I purchased a used pair marked “acceptable” so I was nervous they’d be beat up or dirty. They came in in the box in perfect condition. They looked brand new & they’re still covered until Apple warranty until 10/24. For anyone whose hesitant to buy a used pair — don’t be. I saved $60 and they looked brand new even though they were marked as acceptable. Highly recommend even if there are a few small cons :)

        Read moreRead less

      • King
        5 out of 5 stars
        Exceptional Upgrade in Wireless Audio!
        Reviewed in the United States on November 1, 2023
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        Certainly! Although I can't personally experience products, I can assist in creating a review for the Apple AirPods (3rd Generation) based on their commonly known features

        The Apple AirPods (3rd Generation) have truly elevated the wireless earbud experience. From the moment I started using them, I was impressed by the significant improvements over their predecessors.

        The design is sleek and comfortable, fitting snugly in the ears without causing any discomfort even during extended use. The sound quality is impressive, offering rich, clear, and well-balanced audio. Whether I'm listening to music, watching videos, or taking calls, the sound is consistently remarkable.

        One of the standout features is the Adaptive EQ, which automatically adjusts the sound to the shape of my ear. This results in a personalized listening experience, enhancing the quality of every track.

        The spatial audio feature is another game-changer, providing an immersive surround sound experience that feels like being in the middle of the action. It's particularly fantastic while watching movies or videos that support this feature.

        The improved battery life is appreciable, giving me ample listening time without frequent charging. The MagSafe charging case is not only convenient but also stylish and compatible with other MagSafe accessories.

        The seamless integration with the Apple ecosystem makes these AirPods a perfect companion for my Apple devices. The setup and connectivity are effortless, and the controls are intuitive and responsive.

        Overall, the Apple AirPods (3rd Generation) are a significant leap forward in wireless earbud technology, offering exceptional sound quality, comfort, and features that make them an excellent choice for anyone looking for a premium audio experience.

        Read moreRead less

      • Zach Mikolajczyk
        4 out of 5 stars
        Small ears beware
        Reviewed in the United States on November 21, 2023
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I upgraded to these from gen 1 air pods. In terms of battery life, sound quality and phone call quality these blow the gen 1s away. The spatial audio feature is pretty neat and is a noticeable difference. I mostly use these for phone calls, whether I’m on teams meetings or having personal conversations. I’ve had people mention how much clearer I sound and how there’s zero background noise thru these vs my old one (that’s saying a lot as I’ll be in meetings while out in the chemical plants). They’re super easy to use. Just open the case and pair them, you can switch over to them during a live call or meeting in a matter of seconds.

        Now on to the bad; these suckers are waayy bigger than the gen 1s. With all the good I mentioned, if you have smaller ears I would 1000% not recommend these. They can start to hurt insanely bad and that’s if they stay in your ears. Through talking and walking they constantly fall out of my ears. I work at a chemical plant and wearing hearing protection is a normal everyday thing, so I know how to properly insert things into your ear but these guys will not stay in. Then falling out your instict is to catch them and push them back in, but the touch buttons pick that up to hang up your phone call or kick you from your meeting, there is a setting to change the hang up touch from 1 touch to 2 touches- thankfully. The gen1 air pods fit perfectly, idk why it didn’t occur to me that they would change the ear bud size that drastically.

        2 lessons I learned-

        1) don’t take all the good reviews for granted and wait to try them incase you have to return them

        2) these will be the last headphones I buy that don’t have rubber ear buds to allow for size adjustability

        Overall a great buy if you have normal to large ear canals. If you prefer the small rubber ear bud adapter on other headphones DO NOT BUY.

        Read moreRead less

      • Danny
        5 out of 5 stars
        Immerse Yourself in Wireless Audio Bliss - Apple AirPods Redefine the Earbud Experience
        Reviewed in the United States on July 13, 2023
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        The Apple AirPods (3rd Generation) are the epitome of wireless earbuds, delivering a remarkable audio experience that combines convenience, style, and cutting-edge technology. With their sleek design, seamless connectivity, and impressive sound quality, these earbuds take your music, calls, and entertainment to a whole new level.

        The standout feature of the Apple AirPods (3rd Generation) is their effortless wireless connectivity. Simply open the charging case near your iPhone or any other Apple device, and the earbuds instantly connect, ready to deliver your favorite tunes. With the Apple H1 chip, the AirPods offer a stable and reliable wireless connection, ensuring uninterrupted audio streaming and crystal-clear calls.

        The AirPods (3rd Generation) are designed to fit comfortably in your ears, thanks to their ergonomic and lightweight construction. They come with three different sizes of silicone ear tips, allowing you to find the perfect fit for enhanced comfort and a secure seal. Whether you're running, working out, or simply going about your day, the AirPods stay in place, providing a hassle-free and comfortable listening experience.

        When it comes to sound quality, the AirPods (3rd Generation) excel. The custom-designed high-excursion drivers deliver immersive sound with rich bass, clear mids, and crisp highs. Whether you're listening to your favorite music genres, podcasts, or audiobooks, the AirPods reproduce the audio with impressive clarity and detail, allowing you to immerse yourself in your content.

        The Apple AirPods (3rd Generation) feature built-in beamforming microphones and an updated speech-detecting accelerometer, ensuring clear and natural-sounding calls. Whether you're taking work calls or catching up with friends, the AirPods capture your voice with precision and minimize background noise, providing a seamless and efficient communication experience.

        Siri, Apple's voice assistant, is always just a "Hey Siri" away with the AirPods (3rd Generation). With hands-free access to Siri, you can ask for directions, control your music, send messages, and more, all without reaching for your iPhone. The voice-activated convenience adds another layer of functionality to these earbuds, making them a true smart companion for your daily tasks.

        The AirPods (3rd Generation) offer impressive battery life, keeping you entertained and connected throughout the day. With up to six hours of listening time on a single charge and an additional 24 hours of battery life provided by the charging case, you can enjoy your music, podcasts, and calls without worrying about running out of power. The quick charging feature provides hours of use with just a few minutes of charging.

        With their seamless integration into the Apple ecosystem, the AirPods (3rd Generation) offer a seamless and effortless user experience. They automatically sync with all your Apple devices, allowing you to switch between them seamlessly. Whether you're listening to music on your iPhone, watching a movie on your iPad, or making a call on your Mac, the AirPods connect effortlessly, providing a truly wireless and versatile audio solution.

        In conclusion, the Apple AirPods (3rd Generation) redefine the earbud experience with their sleek design, effortless wireless connectivity, and impressive sound quality. Whether you're a music enthusiast, a busy professional, or an on-the-go individual, these earbuds offer convenience, comfort, and outstanding audio performance. Immerse yourself in wireless audio bliss with the Apple AirPods (3rd Generation) and elevate your everyday listening experience.

      • Sunny dhama
        5 out of 5 stars
        AirPods 3rd Gen: The Earbuds That Have It All (Except Maybe a Coffee Maker)
        Reviewed in the United States on November 18, 2023
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        In the whirlwind of technology and endless gadget releases, Apple's AirPods (3rd Generation) stand out like a beacon of simplicity and sophistication - much like a well-written piece of code in a sea of programming chaos. As someone who's no stranger to the tech world (hello, countless hours of coding and debugging), I've found these AirPods to be an essential accessory, almost as crucial as my laptop.

        First off, let's talk about the personalized spatial audio. It's like having a surround sound theater plugged directly into your ears, minus the bulky headphones and popcorn kernels. Whether I'm immersing myself in my favorite tunes to escape the monotony of debugging or catching up on tech podcasts, the sound quality is nothing short of stellar. It's an auditory experience that makes you question if these earbuds secretly house a team of tiny musicians.

        Sweat and water-resistant? Absolutely. For someone living in sunny and sometimes sweaty Florida, this feature is a godsend. It means I can go from a coding marathon at the University of Florida to a literal marathon (or, let's be real, a brisk walk) without worrying about my earbuds throwing in the towel before I do.

        The convenience of the Lightning Charging Case is like having a portable power bank specifically for your earbuds. It's compact, efficient, and ensures that my AirPods are always ready for action - much like my trusty laptop, always charged for those unexpected coding sessions.

        Now, let's talk battery life. Up to 30 hours? That's longer than some of my longest coding sessions (which is saying something). It's reassuring to know that my AirPods will likely outlast my laptop's battery and my own energy levels.

        In the world of Bluetooth headphones, the AirPods 3rd Gen are like the sleek, high-performing sports car everyone wants to drive. They pair seamlessly with my devices, ensuring I'm always just a tap away from crystal-clear audio, whether I'm taking calls or drowning out background noise to focus on my work.

        In conclusion, Apple's AirPods (3rd Generation) are more than just earbuds; they're a lifestyle upgrade. For tech enthusiasts, coders, or just about anyone who appreciates quality sound and convenience, these AirPods are a must-have in 2023.

      • a person
        5 out of 5 stars
        Best earbuds I've ever owned
        Reviewed in Canada on September 7, 2024
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        Alright so the pros....

        -Most comfortable earbuds I've ever had (smaller than average ears)

        -Amazing sound quality

        -Great portability

        -Great battery life

        -Works well with android

        -The gesture pinching buttons work great and prevent you from accidently pressing them when you're just adjusting the earbud

        -EQ is really nice, pretty good bass and highs. Not quite as rich sounding as an over the ear ANC headset but that's the price you pay for portability

        Cons

        -Only con I can think of is you don't get all the features like spatial audio with android

        -Also they are a bit pricey but if you get used-like new version you can save a lot and they are pretty much brand new, just might have been opened.

        I bought the "used- like new" version of these headphones and it came in brand new packaging without any significant damage that I've noticed at least.

        Couldn't be happier with these. I'll be using Airpods for the foreseeable future, they're gonna be hard for a company to beat. Great way to get your tunes bumping on the go without lugging around massive over the ear headphones or dealing with wires.

        week later still haven't had to charge them once... apple did just announce the 4th gen airpods with a few new features but I'm still keeping these because they are like 100$ cheaper. I am really happy with them. I hope they last is all.

      • Jacob
        5 out of 5 stars
        Fantastic Sound and Value for Apple Fans!
        Reviewed in Canada on October 23, 2024
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        I recently picked up the Apple AirPods (3rd Generation), and I’m thoroughly impressed! The sound quality is excellent—clear and balanced across all frequencies. The bass is punchy without being overwhelming, and the mids and highs are crisp, making them perfect for everything from music to podcasts to phone calls. They really deliver that premium Apple audio experience in a way that’s much better than previous generations.

        For an Apple product, the price is actually reasonable, especially considering all the features you get. The spatial audio is a game-changer, giving you a more immersive listening experience. They also pair seamlessly with all my Apple devices, and switching between my iPhone, iPad, and Mac is effortless.

        The fit is comfortable and secure, even during long listening sessions or while exercising. The battery life is solid too—I can get through a full day without needing to charge them, and the MagSafe charging case is super convenient.

        If you’re in the Apple ecosystem and want high-quality wireless earbuds with great sound and features, these AirPods are a fantastic value. Highly recommend!
